Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic

Class SpigotSchematic

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.AbstractSchematic
net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic.SpigotSchematic
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic
@NullMarked @AvailableSince("0.0.46") public class SpigotSchematic extends net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.AbstractSchematic
Represents a schematic implementation for the Spigot platform.

Provides methods to paste schematics into the world using Spigot-specific operations. Supports flexible axis ordering, block placement filtering, and custom block data mapping.

Usage example: 

     SpigotSchematic schematic = ...;
     Location origin = ...;
     SpigotPasteOperation operation = schematic.paste(origin);
Since:
0.0.46
See Also:
  • AbstractSchematic
  • SpigotPasteOperation
  • SpigotSchematicPlacer

  • Constructor Details

    • SpigotSchematic

      public SpigotSchematic(net.apartium.cocoabeans.structs.MinecraftPlatform platform, Instant created, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicMetadata metadata, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position offset, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.AreaSize size, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axes, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockIterator iterator)
      Constructs a SpigotSchematic with explicit parameters.
      Parameters:
      platform - the Minecraft platform
      created - the creation timestamp
      metadata - schematic metadata
      offset - the offset position
      size - the area size
      axes - the axis order
      iterator - the block iterator

    • SpigotSchematic

      public SpigotSchematic(net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic schematic)

      schematic - the schematic to copy

  • Method Details

    • paste

      public SpigotPasteOperation paste(org.bukkit.Location origin)
      Pastes the schematic at the given origin location using the default axis order.
      Parameters:
      origin - the origin location
      Returns:
      the paste operation

    • paste

      public SpigotPasteOperation paste(org.bukkit.Location origin, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder)
      Pastes the schematic at the given origin location with a specified axis order. Only places blocks if the current block is air.
      Parameters:
      origin - the origin location
      axisOrder - the axis order
      Returns:
      the paste operation

    • paste

      public SpigotPasteOperation paste(org.bukkit.Location origin, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockIterator iterator)
      Pastes the schematic at the given origin location with a specified axis order. Only places blocks if the current block is air.
      Parameters:
      origin - the origin location
      axisOrder - the axis order
      iterator - the block iterator, used to determine the order of block placement
      Returns:
      the paste operation

    • toBuilder

      public SpigotSchematicBuilder toBuilder()
      Converts this schematic to a builder for further modification.
      Returns:
      a builder initialized with this schematic
